h1: Custom Disposable Cups for Events, Offices & Promotions
metaDescription: Order custom disposable cups with your logo for events, offices, and promotions. Fast turnaround and bulk pricing at Perfect Imprints.
introHtml:
Marketing directors, HR directors, safety managers, and business owners often need disposable cups for events, breakrooms, or brand promotions. Whether you're planning a company picnic, a trade show, or a daily office refreshment station, custom disposable cups offer a practical way to keep beverages handy while reinforcing your brand.

Perfect Imprints carries a wide range of customizable cups, from lightweight stadium cups and tumblers to recyclable options like the 16 oz Recyclable Steel Chill-Cups™ and eco-friendly choices. You can decorate them with your logo or message using screen printing, full-color print, or laser engraving. Sizes range from 10 oz to 32 oz, so you can find the right fit for coffee, water, soda, or beer.

We serve bulk buyers with low minimum order quantities and fast production lead times. Many cups are in stock and ready for imprint. Samples are available so you can feel the quality before placing a large order. Explore our collection to find durable, customizable disposable cups that make your brand a part of every sip.

faqs.q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom disposable cups?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by cup style. Many popular styles, like the 16 oz Stadium Cup, start at just 72 pieces. Larger or custom-color orders may require higher minimums. Contact our sales team for exact MOQs on specific products.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for cups?
faqs.a: We offer screen printing for most disposable cups, full-color digital printing for detailed logos, and laser engraving for select tumblers. Screen printing is cost-effective for one- or two-color designs, while full-color print works best for complex artwork.

faqs.q: Can I get a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, samples are available for most cup styles. You can order a sample with or without your imprint to check size, material, and print quality. Sample costs and shipping are typically deducted from your first production order.

faqs.q: What is the typical production lead time?
faqs.a: Standard production lead time is 7-10 business days after artwork approval. Rush orders may be available for an additional fee. Shipping time depends on your location and chosen carrier.

faqs.q: Are these cups recyclable or compostable?
faqs.a: Many of our disposable cups are recyclable. For example, the 16 oz Recyclable Steel Chill-Cups™ are made from recyclable steel. We also offer some compostable options. Check individual product descriptions for specific eco-friendly features.

heroAltText: A stack of custom disposable stadium cups with a printed logo, ideal for office events and promotions.
